task_name: FLS Program Overview and Facility Tour
reason_not_scored: This video is a comprehensive institutional/promotional documentary about an FLS training program and surgical simulation center. It contains: facility tours, interviews with program directors and faculty (Russell D. Metcalfe-Smith identified), administrative discussion of Women's Guild support, equipment demonstrations, trainee testimonials, and brief glimpses of actual training but NOT a complete, scoreable performance of any single FLS task. The frames show equipment setup, classroom instruction, facility infrastructure, and fragmented training activities—not a continuous, timed performance suitable for FLS rubric application.

segments_identified.segment: Equipment demonstration and FLS trainer overview

confidence_rationale: This is clearly instructional/promotional content, not a scoreable performance. The video does not present a continuous, timed execution of any single FLS task with clear start, completion, and outcome. It is a documentary-style presentation of an FLS training program.
scoring_decision: DO NOT SCORE — Content does not meet criteria for performance or expert_demo classification. No timed task performance is present. Return instructional classification only.
